---
description: 'Use when creating or updating README.md. Enforce the Devoxx Copilot Game README section structure and required content categories.'
applyTo: 'README.md'
---

# README Structure Requirements

When editing `README.md`, keep the document organized with these required top-level categories in this order:

1. Brief Summary of the Game
2. Stack of the Project
3. How to Play and Main Actions of the Game
4. Architecture of the Game
5. Brief Explanation of PhaserJS
6. Specification of the Game

## Rules

- Keep all six categories present at all times.
- Use clear, concise language suitable for new contributors.
- If details are unknown, add a short TODO note instead of removing a category.
- Preserve runnable setup and command instructions when updating sections.
- Ensure gameplay actions match current in-game controls and menus.

## Content Expectations

- Brief Summary of the Game: one short paragraph describing the game concept and current maturity.
- Stack of the Project: explicit list of core technologies and tooling.
- How to Play and Main Actions of the Game: controls and key user actions.
- Architecture of the Game: high-level structure, scene flow, and major source folders.
- Brief Explanation of PhaserJS: concise description of Phaser's role in this project.
- Specification of the Game: current gameplay loop and planned feature direction.
